description: Comprehensive Velociraptor DFIR monitoring — server health, client comms, replication, hunts, flows, uploads, and Go runtime metrics.

panels.title: Connected Clients
panels.description: Current number of clients connected to the frontend

panels.title: Server CPU %
panels.description: CPU utilization of the Velociraptor process

panels.title: Memory (RSS)
panels.description: Resident set size of the Velociraptor process

panels.title: Open File Descriptors
panels.description: Number of open FDs — watch for leaks

panels.title: Data Ingestion Rate
panels.description: Total rows received from clients per second — proxy for collection activity

panels.title: Goroutines
panels.description: Active Go goroutines — spikes may indicate leak or overload

panels.title: Build Version
panels.description: Running Velociraptor version by commit hash and build time

panels.title: Org Services Started
panels.description: Number of org services that have been started

panels.title: Minion gRPC Connections
panels.description: Active gRPC connections from minions to the master frontend

panels.title: Uploaded Files (Total)
panels.description: Total uploaded files from all clients

panels.title: Uploaded Bytes (Total)
panels.description: Total bytes uploaded from all clients

panels.title: CPU Usage Over Time
panels.description: Rate of CPU seconds consumed by the Velociraptor process

panels.title: Memory (RSS) Over Time
panels.description: Resident set size of the Velociraptor process over time

panels.title: Goroutines Over Time
panels.description: Active Go goroutines — sustained spikes indicate goroutine leaks

panels.title: Open File Descriptors Over Time
panels.description: FD usage over time — critical for detecting file handle leaks (e.g. unrotated logs)

panels.title: Connected Clients Over Time
panels.description: Number of clients with active connections to the frontend

panels.title: Client Comms Concurrency
panels.description: Current concurrency level of client communication handlers

panels.title: Connected Clients — TCP vs WebSocket
panels.description: Breakdown of client connections by transport type (standard TCP vs WebSocket)

panels.title: Client Event Table Updates & Task Notifications
panels.description: Rate of event table updates pushed to clients and task notifications received — indicators of fleet management activity

panels.title: Frontend Receive QPS
panels.description: Queries per second on the receive handler

panels.title: Frontend Send / Receive Rate
panels.description: Rate of POST requests sent to and received from clients

panels.title: Frontend Received Bytes Rate
panels.description: Bytes per second received from clients

panels.title: Frontend Errors & Rejections
panels.description: Load shedding, decryption errors, timeout rejections, and redirects — all error/rejection signals from the frontend

panels.title: Decryption Errors
panels.description: Rate of decryption failures — indicates corrupted or unauthorized client messages

panels.title: Enroll Responses (406) & Timeout Rejections
panels.description: Enrollment responses and concurrency timeout rejections

panels.title: Frontend Receiver Latency (Heatmap)
panels.description: Distribution of time to receive client data — buckets from 0.1s to 10s

panels.title: Concurrency Wait Latency (Heatmap)
panels.description: Time clients wait for a concurrency slot — high values mean the frontend is saturated

panels.title: Receiver Latency Percentiles
panels.description: p50, p90, p99 latency to receive data from clients

panels.title: Concurrency Wait Percentiles
panels.description: p50, p90, p99 time clients wait for a slot — high p99 = frontend saturation

panels.title: Data Ingestion Rate (Total & Events)
panels.description: Rate of all data rows + event monitoring rows received from clients — proxy for hunt/flow activity

panels.title: Hunt Dispatcher Last Timestamp
panels.description: Unix timestamp of the most recent hunt — flatline means no new hunts being dispatched

panels.title: Event Monitoring Rows Ingested
panels.description: Rate of event rows received from client monitoring artifacts

panels.title: Flow Cancellations
panels.description: Rate of flow cancellation messages sent to clients

panels.title: File Upload Rate
panels.description: Rate of files being uploaded from clients

panels.title: Upload Throughput
panels.description: Bytes per second uploaded from clients

panels.title: Notification Send / Receive Rate
panels.description: Rate of notification messages sent and received

panels.title: Client Ping Timeouts
panels.description: Rate of client ping timeouts — high values indicate unreachable or slow clients

panels.title: Is-Client-Connected Latency (Heatmap)
panels.description: How long it takes to determine if a client is connected

panels.title: Minion gRPC Connections
panels.description: Current number of gRPC connections from minions to the master

panels.title: Replication Send / Receive Rate
panels.description: Rate of replication PushRow RPCs sent and events received from master

panels.title: Replication Latency (Heatmap)
panels.description: Latency for minion-to-master replication messages

panels.title: Replication Latency Percentiles
panels.description: p50, p90, p99 minion-to-master replication latency

panels.title: Replication Message Size (Heatmap)
panels.description: Size distribution of replicated messages — large messages may indicate bulk data transfer

panels.title: Search Index LRU — Cached Terms
panels.description: Total terms cached in the search index LRU — growth without plateau may indicate leak

panels.title: Label Cache — Total Labels
panels.description: Total labels cached in the labeler LRU

title: Velociraptor DFIR — Full Observability
